note: Baseline for the small ingest fixture in .github/workflows/ci.yml (glucose + ATP hydrolysis). Flux should be 0 under closed exchanges because the reactions are stoichiometrically balanced and the synthesised ATPM cannot run without exogenous ATP. Regenerate via: gapsmith-db universal pin-atp-cycle --model ci-data/universal.xml --pinned-at <tag>. cobra's SBML writer is not byte-stable, so model_sha256 is informational only; the flux is the regression signal.
